name: Bath Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the sea salt, baking soda, and cornstarch.
4. Add the light oil and Vitamin E oil to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
5. Stir in the eggs one at a time until the dough forms small balls.
6. Roll each ball into an oval shape and place on the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely before using.
Yield: 24 cookies (enough for 12 baths)
